privileged_info_summary: This task involves triaging 20 real, seminal papers in distributed systems. Papers are classified into 'Classic Systems' (published in 2004 or earlier: 8 papers) and 'Modern Systems' (published in 2005 or later: 12 papers). The cutoff year is 2004, and all 20 papers are real academic publications with verified correct publication years including: Google File System (2003), MapReduce (2004), Bigtable (2006), Dynamo (2007), Paxos Made Simple (2001), Raft (2014), and Spanner (2012). The data is synthetically loaded into Zotero via the seed_library.py script for task execution.
